created_date.description: The date and time when the VPC endpoint was created.

id.description: The unique identifier of the VPC endpoint.

name.description: The name of the VPC endpoint.

security_group_ids.description: A list of security group IDs associated with the VPC endpoint.

subnet_ids.description: A list of subnet IDs in which the VPC endpoint is located.

vpc_id.description: The ID of the VPC in which the endpoint is created.
